policy.meaning: Technical parity evidence only. Runtime execution still requires a current hash-bound admission report and two independent approvals.
policy.research_only: A research_only pass is noncommercial and cannot authorize deployment.
policy.fp32_lock: Reduced precision is not admitted by these records; each admitted adapter is initially locked to FP32 unless a later evidence record replaces it.

official_example.evidence: public upstream forecast API executed on deterministic synthetic fixtures

adapter_public_api_parity.evidence: candidate adapter matched the public upstream output surface

scaling_inverse_scaling.evidence: native scaling/inverse behavior checked on affine fixtures

padding_mask_missing_values.reason: model-specific record supplies pass or an explicit native-input limitation

frequency_timezone_covariates.reason: model has no frequency/timezone input unless overridden by the record

channel_semantics.evidence: declared independent or grouped channel behavior was exercised

batch_partition_parity.evidence: batched and partitioned outputs agreed within the recorded tolerance

fp32_finite.evidence: all admitted outputs were finite in FP32

reduced_precision_tolerance.reason: this evidence locks the native adapter to FP32

context_horizon_boundaries.evidence: the declared context and 16-step evaluation horizon were exercised

prefix_invariance.evidence: adapter preprocessing consumes only the supplied causal context

gradient_freeze_surface.reason: base inference evidence does not admit adaptation

repeated_batch_loss_decrease.reason: base inference evidence does not admit adaptation

exact_resume.reason: base inference evidence does not admit adaptation

save_reload_export.reason: base inference evidence does not admit adaptation

license_governance.evidence: code and weight licenses were recorded in the dossier
